Pirates]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Thug Removal|the Nova Orion Station}} *[[Privateer/Legends|Privateers]] *[[Velocity Mercenaries]]{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Tap into Enemy Communications|Dantooine system}} *[[Void Wings/Legends|Void Wings]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Void Wing Pilot Quota Progress}} }} The '''Rihkxyrk (rik-zerk) Assault Fighter''' was a heavy assault fighter built by [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]]. ==Characteristics== [[File:Rihkxyrk_Heavy_Starfighter.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Multiple views of a Rihkxyrk]] The Rihkxyrk was a relatively sluggish fighter, but this was compensated for by its good defenses and weapons loadout. It was one of the most heavily armed and armored starfighters of the [[Rebellion era]]. ==History==
[[File:VaksaiRihkxyrk-RECG.png|thumb|left|200px|A Rihkxyrk fighter flying in formation with two Vaksai starfighters]]
The ship was used by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] organization as well as other criminal groups during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ship's tight defenses led to many Rihkxyrk pilots having a high sense of confidence in their own abilities as well as that of their ships, after surviving undamaged in many heavy conflicts.
